arts.ttl: Flick sends strong message to Barca players after Monaco defeat
arts.sum: Hansi Flick sent out a strong message to his players after seeing his team beaten for the first time this season against Monaco in the Champions League. We lost this game, but we will continue to fight.”

arts.ttl: Barcelona stunned by Monaco after Lamine Yamal’s first Champions League goal
arts.sum: It was Barcelona’s first defeat under new boss Hansi Flick while there were wins for Bayer Leverkusen and Atletico Madrid

arts.ttl: Monaco take down 10-man Barca in Flick's 1st loss
arts.sum: Barcelona made a disappointing start to their Champions League campaign by losing 2-1 to AS Monaco on Thursday after suffering an early blow from defender Eric Garcia's dismissal.

arts.ttl: Barcelona's Eric Garcia is eventually sent off after referee initially showed him the wrong card in 2-1 defeat at Monaco
arts.sum: Barcelona defender Eric Garcia was eventually sent off in Thursday's Champions League opener against AS Monaco after the referee got his cards muddled up.

arts.ttl: Monaco 2-1 Barcelona: Highlights, man of the match, stats from European affair
arts.sum: Monaco make use of their one-man advantage to record a 2-1 victory over Barcelona in the Champions League on Thursday night.
